programs.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programs.desc: For the first time since blasting Kilcher Road, Eivin tries to haul a huge pole barn to his homestead. Jewel and her son visit, and August builds a unique outhouse. S9 E10.

programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: In Tennessee's Smoky Mountains a family's homestead is failing because they choose to live on the useless side of their land attached to power.

programs.title: The Good Doctor
programs.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy makes a personal connection with a precocious young patient which threatens his objectivity. telemedicine services for nursing homes and care facilities.

programs.title: Pretty Little Liars
programs.desc: With Christmas approaching Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer look to clear Spencer's name. Alison gets a glimpse at the past, present and future by a ghostly presence.
